author: research-shell-nix
content:
Completed: Research + working shell.nix for crosslink-sandbox compatibility.

Delivered:
- shell.nix at project root with two modes: .conda-env prefix (preferred) and nix python314 fallback
- All core tools verified working inside sandbox: python 3.14.3, git, gh, nodejs, pytest, pre-commit, selenium, openwpm import
- Knowledge page 'nix-conda-sandbox' with full findings
- Proposed ~25-line .sandbox.json change for crosslink-sandbox (Path B2, follow-up)

Key findings:
- nixpkgs has python314 (3.14.3) with good coverage (~25 of 30 needed packages)
- Missing from nix: gcsfs/s3fs (cfn-lint py3.14 incompatibility), domain-utils, tranco, pytest-split
- ~/.conda is on tmpfs, project dir on ZFS — different filesystems, no cross-FS hardlinks
- Conda prefix-install inside project dir works without sandbox changes

Not done: .conda-env creation (requires user to run conda create outside sandbox), sandbox modification (separate issue)
